name: ecommerce-pms
description: This project, titled E-Commerce Product Management System, is a comprehensive full-stack development project designed to simulate a real-world online shopping platform. The primary goal is to build an application that allows users to interact with a product catalog seamlessly. Key functionalities include: Product Browsing: A dynamic interface for users to view available items. Shopping Cart Management: Capabilities to add, remove, or update items before checkout. Order Processing: A system to handle the logic of completing a purchase. Technical Architecture The system is built on a modern full-stack architecture consisting of: Frontend: A responsive user interface designed to work across various devices (mobile, tablet, and desktop). Backend: A RESTful API that manages data exchange between the server and the client. Security: Implementation of user authentication to ensure secure access to personal accounts and order history.
